title: Olive
description: Recreation of Olive from the Interloper ARG.
body:
# Warnings

> This mod contains flashing imagery. If you have watched the Interloper series, I am referring to the cubemap generation sequences. This contains a similar-ish thing but with Minecraft's textures.

> This mod will close your game when you are caught by Olive. During the "cubemap" sequence, it will save your game, though if you have a mod that disables saving when you pause your game, you should play this at your own risk.

## Info

A simple recreation of the "Umbrella Man" from the Interloper ARG by Anomidae.

When spawned, the entity will move towards you (the person who summoned it), ignoring walls or obstacles. It will follow you no matter where you go, and will follow you to other dimensions.


```
FOR J.J
command: INTERLOPE
"Unknown or incomplete command, see below for error"
command: get "s.interlope.pull:25565"
```
